%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%% USER SETTINGS — edit values here. Do not edit files under template/.
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

%%% Mandatory %%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

% Bachelor's Thesis Proposal or Master's Thesis Proposal
\newcommand{\thesistype}{Master's Thesis Proposal}

% Title of the planned thesis
\newcommand{\thesistitle}{Insert title here: configure in \code|settings.tex|}

% Full author name
\newcommand{\authorname}{Insert your name here}

% Matriculation number
\newcommand{\matrnr}{1234567}

% Official name of the study program
\newcommand{\studyprogram}{Computer Science}

% Research group at which the thesis is written
\newcommand{\researchgroup}{Robust, Secure and Privacy-Preserving Smart Systems}

% Faculty / school the research group belongs to
\newcommand{\faculty}{School of Electrical, Information and Media Engineering}

% Supervisor (advisor)
\newcommand{\supervisor}{Name of supervisor\newline Name of another supervisor\newline}

% First examiner (Erstgutachter)
\newcommand{\firstexaminer}{Prof. Dr. Insert name}

% Second examiner (Zweitgutachter)
\newcommand{\secondexaminer}{Prof. Dr. Insert name}

% Submission date (e.g., \today or a fixed date)
\newcommand{\submissiondate}{\today}

% Place of submission
\newcommand{\submissionlocation}{Wuppertal}

% Keywords used in the PDF metadata (comma-separated)
\newcommand{\keywords}{thesis proposal, exposé, research plan}


%%% Layout toggles %%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

\setbool{twoside}{true}              % two-sided printing
\setbool{markLinks}{false}           % visible boxes around hyperlinks
\setbool{color}{true}                % use BUW colors (false = grayscale)
